suppress.notes: org.eclipse.angus:angus-activation 2.0.3 is the latest stable release in Maven Central. Dependency-Check maps it to the wider angus_mail CPE; review when a newer stable Angus Activation release is available.

Apache Tomcat 10.1.54 is the latest 10.1.x release available in Maven Central for Spring Boot 3.5.x. Review and remove this suppression when a fixed 10.1.x release is available or after a tested migration to the next supported Spring Boot/Tomcat line.

Apache Tomcat 10.1.54 is the latest 10.1.x release available in Maven Central for Spring Boot 3.5.x. This suppresses the matching embedded WebSocket artifact from the same Tomcat release and must be reviewed with the core Tomcat suppression.

Spring Framework 6.2.18 is the version managed by Spring Boot 3.5.14 (the release in use). These CVEs (CVSS 7.5) are framework-wide: Dependency-Check maps each one to every Spring Framework artifact of this version (spring-core, spring-tx, spring-beans, spring-web, ...). The regex therefore covers the whole org.springframework umbrella at 6.2.18, while the CVE list stays specific so only these advisories are suppressed. No fixed Spring Boot 3.5.x release is available at the Sprint 2 submission (2026-06-16). Risk accepted and time-boxed; upgrade Spring Boot when a patched 3.5.x / 3.6.x line is published. Tracked in Deliverables/phase2/sprint2/security_findings.md.

Spring Security 6.5.10 is managed by Spring Boot 3.5.14. CVE-2026-40988 (CVSS 7.5) is framework-wide: Dependency-Check maps it to every Spring Security artifact of this version (spring-security-core, spring-security-web, spring-security-config, ...). The regex covers the whole org.springframework.security umbrella at 6.5.10 while the CVE list stays specific. No fixed release for the 3.5.x line at submission. Risk accepted and time-boxed; review with the spring-core suppression on the next Spring Boot upgrade.
